results.title: The Open chief explains Bryson DeChambeau penalty after heated discussions
results.description: Bryson DeChambeau has been dropped from second place to fifth at The Open Championship after being slapped with a two-stroke penalty after Friday's second round at Royal Birkdale

results.title: England, France disappointed to play for World Cup bronze but say they have a ‘duty’ to win
results.description: MIAMI GARDENS – The English and French teams wish they were not in South Florida this weekend.
